import 'package:gobl_utils_dart/gobl_utils_dart.dart';

abstract class CurrencyBase extends GoblEntity with GoblSinglePKEntity
{
	CurrencyBase({
		Map<String, dynamic> initialData = const {},
		String name,
		String prefix,
		List<String> columns
	})
		: super(
			initialData: initialData,
			name: name,
			prefix: prefix,
			columns: columns
	);
}
